changeSet.author: A12S-5713-author
changeSet.sql: alter table jsonb_document_fields add column if not exists search_data text;

changeSet.author: A12S-5713-author
A12S-5735-author
changeSet.sql: alter index jsonb_document_fields_pkey rename to document_search_pkey;

changeSet.author: A12S-5543-author
changeSet.sql: drop trigger if exists createfulltexttrigger ON document_search; drop index if exists idx_simple_search_jsonb;

changeSet.author: A12S-5879-author
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_document_search_original_value ON document_search USING gin (model_name, original_value);

changeSet.author: A12S-5918-author
A12S-5918-author
A12S-5727author
changeSet.sql: alter table model_headers add column if not exists description text;

changeSet.author: A12S-6034author
